motion.name: Scenario response
motion.purpose: State and control feedback without animating chart layout.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Use for export or the single strongest local action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 36px; padding: 0 13px; color: #050d18; background: #31d3c5; border: 1px solid #31d3c5; border-radius: 4px; font: 700 .64rem Cascadia Code, Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: .06em; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #56e2d6; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #59a8ff; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Compact selection for time windows, scenarios, and model modes.
components.css: .ds-segment { display: flex; padding: 3px; background: #081624; border: 1px solid #18364c; border-radius: 5px; } .ds-segment button { min-height: 30px; padding: 0 10px; color: #6f879b; background: transparent; border: 0; border-radius: 3px; font: 700 .63rem Cascadia Code, Consolas, monospace; } .ds-segment .is-selected { color: #e8f1f7; background: #11283b; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(89,168,255,.4); } .ds-segment button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #59a8ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Source State
components.description: Non-color-only source health marker for live, degraded, or demo data.
components.css: .ds-source-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: #31d3c5; font: 700 .56rem Cascadia Code, Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-source-live i { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: currentColor; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(49,211,197,.12); }

components.name: Intelligence Panel
components.description: Structured evidence surface with restrained navy depth.
components.html:
PRIMARY ESTIMATE

Oil futures signal fusion

Observed and modeled evidence remain visually distinct.
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 20px; color: #e8f1f7; background: #081624; border-top: 1px solid #18364c; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 20px 46px rgba(0,4,10,.34); font-family: Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-panel small { color: #31d3c5; font: 700 .64rem Cascadia Code, Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: .1em; } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 8px 0; font-family: Bahnschrift, Arial Narrow, sans-serif; } .ds-panel p { color: #9bb0c2; }

components.name: Model Toggle
components.description: Small accessible switch controlling ensemble membership.
components.css: .ds-model-toggle { width: 24px; height: 14px; position: relative; padding: 0; background: rgba(49,211,197,.2); border: 0; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-model-toggle i { position: absolute; left: 12px; top: 2px; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #31d3c5; border-radius: 50%; transition: left 160ms ease, background 160ms ease; } .ds-model-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #59a8ff; outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview: StraitSignal feels like a well-run research desk monitoring a fast-moving physical system: dense where comparison matters, quiet where judgment matters, and exact about the boundary between evidence and inference.
keyCharacteristics: Deep navy operational surfaces with fixed signal semantics.
Large analytical plots with local provenance.
Purposeful motion limited to state feedback.

rules.name: The Signal Semantics Rule
rules.body: A signal color never changes meaning between charts, source health, and alerts.

rules.name: The Measurement Rule
rules.body: Monospace is earned by data or machine-readable content.

rules.name: The Evidence-First Rule
rules.body: The largest area belongs to the evidence currently driving the decision.

dos: Do label demo, stale, inferred, and live values explicitly.
Do show forecast intervals and model spread beside point estimates.
donts: Don't present the forecast as financial advice or guaranteed truth.
Don't imply that polling causes oil prices.
